headline: Medtronic to announce financial results for its fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2026
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT), a global leader in healthcare technology, today announced that it will report financial results on Wednesday, June 3, 2026, for its fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2026, which ends on Friday, April 24, 2026.
